case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. STELLA GI et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED OCT-29-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GI, STELLA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GI, STELLA
